transcript:
CALLER: Hi, yeh Sunrise Clinic? I want to cancel two appointments actually. Both mine and my wife's.
AGENT: Sure, I can help with both. Let me take the details one at a time. Your name first?
CALLER: Mohit Tiwari. And my wife's name is Geeta Tiwari.
AGENT: And the appointment dates for each?
CALLER: Mine was this Friday 3 PM with the GP. Geeta's was Saturday morning 10 AM, I think with Dr. Kulkarni.
AGENT: Let me check... yes, found both. Mohit Tiwari, Friday 3 PM with Dr. Ramesh Iyer, and Geeta Tiwari, Saturday 10 AM with Dr. Sneha Kulkarni. Cancelling both?
CALLER: Yes please.
AGENT: Done. Both appointments have been cancelled. You'll get confirmation messages on your registered numbers. Anything else?
CALLER: No, that's sorted. Thanks.
